title: Dekton Flat Screwdriver 3mm x 75mm | Durable CR-V Steel Construction | Magnetic Tip for Easy Screw Pick-Up | Non-Slip Rubber Handle for Improved Grip and Control | Ideal for DIY & Home Improvement
features: Durable CR-V Steel Construction: The Dekton Flat Screwdriver is made from high-quality CR-V steel, ensuring durability and strength for both heavy-duty and everyday tasks. This robust material provides long-lasting performance, making it ideal for various DIY, home improvement, and professional applications.

Magnetic Tip for Convenience: Equipped with a magnetic tip, this screwdriver allows you to easily pick up and handle screws, preventing loss or dropping in hard-to-reach areas. The strong magnetic feature ensures precision and efficiency during work, especially in confined spaces.

Comfortable Rubber Handle: Designed for comfort and control, the screwdriver features a non-slip rubber handle that provides a secure grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended use. The ergonomic design ensures excellent torque and precision while making the tool comfortable for repetitive tasks.

Versatile Application: The Dekton Flat Screwdriver is ideal for a wide range of applications, including automotive repair, furniture assembly, electronics, and general household maintenance. Its versatile design makes it a must-have tool for any toolbox, providing reliable performance in every situation.
description: The Dekton Flat Screwdriver 6mm x 38mm is a durable and reliable tool, designed to handle a variety of tasks with ease. Made from high-quality CR-V steel, this screwdriver offers long-lasting strength and performance for both professional and DIY use. Its magnetic tip ensures screws are easily picked up and handled, making work in tight or hard-to-reach spaces more efficient. The comfortable, non-slip rubber handle provides excellent grip, reducing hand fatigue and offering greater control, especially during extended tasks. Compact in size, the 6mm x 38mm blade is perfect for precision work, delivering accurate results in confined areas. Whether you’re assembling furniture, working on electronics, or handling everyday repairs, the Dekton Flat Screwdriver is a versatile tool that belongs in every toolbox. Ideal for both light and heavy-duty applications, it’s engineered to provide reliable, efficient performance in any situation.
